verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  -- `wignerMatrixMap` is definitionally `wignerMatrixMap'`, and `Matrix.of` is measurable
  -- once all coordinate functions are measurable.
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap'] using
    (measurable_of fun i j => by
      -- `wignerMatrixEntryFunction` is a finite combination of measurable coordinate projections
      -- and `if`-expressions.
      classical
      by_cases h_eq : i = j
      · subst h_eq
        simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
      · by_cases h_lt : i < j
        · simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_eq, h_lt]
        · have h_gt : j < i := by
            apply lt_of_le_of_ne
            · exact le_of_not_gt h_lt
            · exact Ne.symm h_eq
          simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_eq, h_lt, h_gt])
